overall.description: Gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man featuring Miles Morales walking along a waterfront promenade at dusk, then transitioning via a hard cut to daytime urban exploration through city streets with modern glass skyscrapers and historic brick buildings, crossing intersections and observing the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk toward the water with the city skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench facing the water

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the dusk sky
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers against the evening sky
tall suspension bridge with lights spanning the water
wide wooden planks forming the walking surface
silver metal safety railing along the water edge
wooden benches with people sitting facing the water
bicycles parked and locked to the railing
dark industrial structure with smokestack on the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden waterfront promenade at dusk, with a metal railing separating the path from the water. The city skyline and a suspension bridge are visible in the distance across the water. People sit on benches to the right, and bicycles are parked along the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: hard cut from waterfront dusk scene to daytime city street under concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, moving through the urban canyon

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in business attire walking alongside ego

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating shadow on the left
tall modern building with reflective blue glass facade
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs
green street sign reading FDR DR attached to the pole
silver sedan parked along the curb under the overpass
large purple banner with text hanging on the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: Following a hard transition from the waterfront, the scene shifts to a daytime urban environment under a massive concrete overpass. The character walks along a sidewalk bordered by the overpass on the left and modern glass skyscrapers on the right. Parked cars line the street, and pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with crosswalk and autumn foliage

events.description: character steps onto and crosses the street at the crosswalk
ground becomes covered with scattered fallen autumn leaves

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians, then continuing along the leaf-covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the crosswalk intersection

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
red brick building with arched windows
scattered orange and brown fallen leaves covering the ground
green newspaper box on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a crosswalk, moving from the shadow of the overpass into a sunlit intersection. A historic red brick building appears on the left while modern glass towers rise on the right. The sidewalk becomes covered with fallen autumn leaves, and vehicles pass by on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between historic and modern architecture

events.description: character stops walking and camera tilts upward to look at the surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the tall buildings, admiring the architecture from street level

entered.detail: silver cylindrical bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character stops between a historic brick building on the left and a modern glass skyscraper on the right, looking up to admire the towering architecture. The camera tilts upward to emphasize the height of the surrounding buildings, with metal bollards visible along the sidewalk edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a serene waterfront at dusk into the bustling, sunlit architecture of a modern city. It begins with the character walking along a wooden promenade beside a metal railing, with a distant suspension bridge and city skyline silhouetted against the evening sky. The scene then shifts abruptly to a daytime urban environment, moving beneath a massive concrete overpass where modern glass skyscrapers rise beside a street lined with parked cars. As the character crosses a street, the shadow of the overpass gives way to a bright intersection where historic red brick buildings contrast with glass towers and autumn leaves cover the sidewalk. Finally, the camera comes to a halt between these opposing architectural styles and tilts upward to emphasize the towering height of the surrounding skyscrapers.
